title: AGEN, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling AGEN's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I. dvisor identified 42 similar cases where AGEN's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $4.20 crossed the resistance line at $4.38 and is trading between $4.38 resistance and $4.20 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 09/16/20 - 10/16/20, the price experienced a -14% Downtrend, while the week of 10/09/20 - 10/16/20 shows a +0.69% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/8biah07os3u51.png?width=1518&format=png&auto=webp&s=d89662d4d54a9fc29f7faa40a64cf2abef60860b

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on October 07, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on AGEN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 57 of 77 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for AGEN just turned positive on October 16, 2020. Looking at past instances where AGEN's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 37 of 42 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

AGEN moved above its 50-day Moving Average on October 15, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +6.83% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where AGEN advanced for three days, in 200 of 247 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 135 of 161 cases where AGEN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 84%.
